Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Miguel Piutlo. Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for Plaintiff.
Defendant Ivery McFarland IS NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of DEC-27-2011 remains on calendar.
